translated: I really wanted to express everything I felt... What we just showed you was the game-size version,
but I hope there'll be a chance to share the full version with you all somewhere, someday.
When that time comes, please do listen to it.
How should I put it? That feeling of Shizuku taking flight after the second chorus...
I'd be so happy if you could really feel that.
Everyone's saying they want to hear the full version!
But even in this version,
I think that feeling of "I'm not afraid of anything anymore" at the end of the chorus really reached everyone.
It was just so good.
And then after that, everyone waves their hands and the stage suddenly brightens up... I really love that part.
I really do.
Anyway, thank you all so much for getting hyped up with me!
This 3DMV was also uploaded to the official ProSeka YouTube channel today at 10:10 PM...
Oh, it's already started.
It's already up, so please go check it out!
Watch it lots, okay?
I'd really appreciate it.
Now then, I'd like for us to take a look at the new illustrations that were added.
There are five of them, and the cards were all incredibly cute.
Let's start by looking at Shizuku's.
Isn't this amazing?
This is the trained version.
You know,
the flowers... the big flower Shizuku is sitting on,
it has this stained-glass or glass-like feel to it that I really love.
It has this beauty that feels both fleeting and fragile.
I really feel that from this.
And here is the untrained version.
